alerts.title: Is AI video just a prequel? Runway’s CEO thinks world models are next
alerts.description: AI-generated video has gone from novelty to creative tool almost overnight, and Runway has a front row seat to the shift. The New York-based company has raised close to $860 million at a $5.3 billion valuation, and its models are going toe-to-toe with the most well-funded labs in the world, includin

alerts.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
alerts.description: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

alerts.title: Firestorm Labs raises $82M to take drone factories into the field
alerts.description: A defense startup just raised $82 million to put drone factories inside shipping containers and bring manufacturing to the front lines.

alerts.title: Colby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100M to train its models for war: We visited its bootcamp
alerts.description: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that can help individual soldiers control fleets of autonomous vehicles.

alerts.title: Scout AI Raises $100M to Build ‘AI Brain' for Autonomous Warfare
alerts.description: The fund raise comes as the White House pushes AI dominance across industries, including defense.

alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 Could Change Global AI Model Race
alerts.description: The model maker released two versions of V4, both of which are open, cheap and use Huawei's AI chips for inference.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Boasts Coding Advancements, But Falls Short of Opus 4.7
alerts.description: While OpenAI has improved the model's coding and tool use ability, it still has room to improve in areas where Anthropic dominates.

alerts.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4-Cyber is More Open Than Claude Mythos
alerts.description: The model could help cybersecurity experts better prepare for attacks.

alerts.title: Anthropic in talks with investors to raise funds at $900 billion valuation, higher than OpenAI
alerts.description: Anthropic is in talks with investors about raising cash at a valuation of $900 billion, CNBC has confirmed.

alerts.title: Is Meta's AI spending blitz working? The stock's next move depends on the answer
alerts.description: The market lately hasn't known quite how to digest Meta's ambitious plans.

alerts.title: True Anomaly raises $650 million to support space interceptors for Trump's Golden Dome
alerts.description: True Anomaly, a four-year-old startup, plans to use the funding to scale manufacturing and double its workforce by the end of the year.
